app.name: Verisure
app.description: Integrate your Verisure France alarm system with Homey

pair.mfa_subtitle: A text message has been sent to your phone
pair.no_devices: No devices found. Make sure your Verisure account is correctly set up.

settings.poll_interval_hint: How often to query the Verisure cloud. Minimum 5 minutes recommended to avoid rate limiting.
settings.disconnect_body: The Verisure session will be deleted. Sensors will no longer update until you reconnect the app.

error.session_expired: Session expired — please re-pair the app
error.no_sensors_found: No contact sensors found on this Verisure account
error.no_cameras_found: No PIR cameras (GuardVision / SmartCam) found on this Verisure account
error.no_installation_found: No Verisure installation found for this account
error.capture_not_allowed: Image capture is not enabled on this device
error.capture_forbidden: Insufficient permissions to access camera images
error.mfa_failed: Incorrect or expired code. Please try again.
error.endpoint_error: Unable to reach the Verisure France service
